creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<http://www.arvernes.com/wiki/index.php/Sunclock>

<https://downforeveryoneorjustme.com/arvernes.com?proto=http&www=1> down. 

<https://directory.fsf.org/wiki/Sunclock> refers to 
<https://github.com/mdoege/Sunclock/archive/master.zip>, not found; 
<https://github.com/mdoege/Sunclock/> is not found, 
<https://github.com/mdoege/Earth> mentions Sunclock but there's no link. 

From <https://github.com/nongiach/Sunclock>: 

> Sunclock 3.57 (not written by me; 
> formerly hosted at http://www.arvernes.com/wiki/index.php/Sunclock)
